text.title: Synthetic Users Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output report.

input.description: Concept variants + Target persona seed (synthetic basis) + Validation plan (real users, 30 days) + Open questions list

trace.step: Bind concepts to synthetic personas; generate reactions.
Mark each reaction surprise_flag=true|false against team priors.
Schedule real-user validation within 30 days; capture URL.
Compose JSON report with all guard flags.
